name: Mocha Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 300 degrees. Lightly grease cookie sheets.
Beat the egg whites, coffee, cream of tartar, and salt in a medium bowl on high speed until foamy. Beat in the sugar one tablespoon at a time on high speed; continue beating until stiff. Do not underbeat.
Stir the cocoa until smooth and powdery.
Fold in the cocoa and coconut. Drop the mixture by rounded teaspoonfuls about 1 inch apart on the cookie sheets.
Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until set. Cool for 10 minutes; remove from the cookie sheets. Cool on wire racks. Sprinkle with additional cocoa or drizzle with melted chocolate, if desired.
